---
title: "ASQ-3 Saudi — Expert Content Review"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    minimal: true
---

```{=html}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ASQ-3 Saudi — Expert Content Review</title>
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --accent:  #2C7A5C;
    --accent2: #1a5276;
    --bg:      #f4f6f8;
    --white:   #ffffff;
    --text:    #222222;
    --muted:   #5a6472;
    --border:  #d0d5dd;
    --row-alt: #f9fafb;
  }

  body {
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ── Header ── */
  .header {
    background: #1a3a4a;
    color: white;
    padding: 28px 40px 24px;
    border-bottom: 4px solid var(--accent);
  }
  .header-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 24px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .header h1 { font-size: 1.4em; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .2px; }
  .header-sub { font-size: .83em; color: #a0b4c0; margin-top: 4px; font-weight: 400; }
  .header-meta { font-size: .8em; color: #a0b4c0; text-align: right; line-height: 1.7; }

  /* ── Intro strip ── */
  .intro {
    background: #e8f4f0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #c8ddd6;
    padding: 16px 40px;
  }
  .intro-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    font-size: .9em;
    color: #2d4a3e;
    line-height: 1.75;
  }

  /* ── Layout ── */
  .content { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 28px 40px 60px; }

  /* ── Cards ── */
  .card {
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 6px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .card-header {
    background: #f0f4f7;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 12px 24px;
    font-size: .95em;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent2);
    letter-spacing: .2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-size: .82em;
  }
  .card-body { padding: 24px; }
  .card-note {
    background: #f0f4f7;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--accent2);
    padding: 10px 14px;
    font-size: .87em;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
  }

  /* ── Form ── */
  .form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 18px; }
  .form-grid.full { grid-template-columns: 1fr; margin-top: 14px; }
  .field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
  .field label { font-size: .85em; font-weight: 600; color: var(--muted); }
  .req { color: #c0392b; margin-left: 2px; }
  .field input, .field select, .field textarea {
    padding: 9px 11px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: .93em;
    font-family: inherit;
    background: white;
    color: var(--text);
    transition: border-color .15s;
  }
  .field input:focus, .field select:focus, .field textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: var(--accent);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(44,122,92,.12);
  }
  .field textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 70px; }

  /* ── Progress ── */
  .progress-wrap { margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .progress-track {
    background: #dde3ea; border-radius: 3px; height: 7px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .progress-fill {
    height: 100%; border-radius: 3px;
    background: var(--accent);
    transition: width .35s ease;
  }
  .progress-text { font-size: .8em; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 5px; }

  /* ── Table ── */
  .tbl-wrap { overflow-x: auto; }
  table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: .88em; }
  thead { background: #1a3a4a; color: white; }
  thead th {
    padding: 11px 10px;
    text-align: left;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: .8em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: .4px;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  tbody tr { border-bottom: 1px solid #e8edf2; }
  tbody tr:nth-child(even) { background: var(--row-alt); }
  tbody tr:hover { background: #eef6f2; }
  td { padding: 9px 10px; vertical-align: top; }

  .dom-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 2px 7px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: .76em;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: white;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .dom-Communication   { background: #2471a3; }
  .dom-Gross-motor     { background: #6e2fa0; }
  .dom-Fine-motor      { background: #b7770d; }
  .dom-Problem-solving { background: #c0392b; }
  .dom-Personal-social { background: #1e8449; }

  .rating-sel {
    width: 58px; padding: 5px 4px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: .85em; text-align: center; cursor: pointer;
    background: white;
  }
  .rating-sel:focus { border-color: var(--accent); outline: none; }

  .comment-ta {
    width: 100%; min-width: 100px; padding: 5px 7px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: .82em; min-height: 48px;
    font-family: inherit; resize: vertical;
  }

  /* ── Buttons ── */
  .btn-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; justify-content: flex-end; margin-top: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn {
    padding: 10px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: .88em; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; letter-spacing: .2px;
  }
  .btn-primary { background: var(--accent); color: white; }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: #246b4f; }
  .btn-secondary { background: white; color: var(--muted); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--bg); }

  /* ── Alerts ── */
  .alert { display: none; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: .88em; border-left: 4px solid; }
  .alert-ok  { background: #eaf6f0; border-color: var(--accent); color: #1e5c3a; }
  .alert-err { background: #fdf0ef; border-color: #c0392b;       color: #7b1c1c; }

  /* ── Spinner ── */
  #loadingMsg { text-align: center; padding: 40px 20px; color: var(--muted); font-size: .9em; }
  .spinner {
    width: 32px; height: 32px; margin: 0 auto 12px;
    border: 3px solid #dde; border-top-color: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 50%; animation: spin .7s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

  .footnote { font-size: .8em; color: var(--muted); text-align: right; margin-top: 8px; }

  @media (max-width: 700px) {
    .header { padding: 20px; }
    .intro  { padding: 14px 20px; }
    .content { padding: 16px 20px 40px; }
    .form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- HEADER -->
<div class="header">
  <div class="header-inner">
    <div>
      <div class="header h1">ASQ-3 Saudi Arabic Validation — Expert Content Review</div>
      <div class="header-sub">Ages &amp; Stages Questionnaires, Third Edition | University of Oregon</div>
    </div>
    <div class="header-meta">
      632 items across 21 questionnaire forms<br>
      5 developmental domains
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- INTRO -->
<div class="intro">
  <div class="intro-inner">
    <strong>Instructions:</strong> You are asked to evaluate each item of the Arabic version of the ASQ-3 for content validity.
    For every item, provide an independent rating of <strong>Quality</strong> (the degree to which the item adequately represents its intended developmental domain)
    and <strong>Clarity</strong> (the degree to which the item wording is comprehensible to Saudi Arabic-speaking parents).
    Use the 5-point scale provided (1 = poor / 5 = excellent). Add comments where clinically relevant.
    When finished, click <em>Download Ratings</em> to save your responses as a CSV file and email it to the research team.
  </div>
</div>

<div class="content">

  <!-- ALERTS -->
  <div id="alertOk"  class="alert alert-ok"></div>
  <div id="alertErr" class="alert alert-err"></div>

  <!-- CREDENTIALS -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-header">Section 1 — Reviewer Information</div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="card-note">All fields marked with * are required and will be included in the exported data file.</div>
      <form id="expertForm">
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="field">
            <label>Full Name <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" id="fullName" required placeholder="As it appears in publications">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Email <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="email" id="email" required placeholder="institutional email preferred">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Institution / Organization</label>
            <input type="text" id="institution" placeholder="e.g., King Abdulaziz University">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Primary Field of Expertise <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <select id="expertise" required>
              <option value="">— Select —</option>
              <option value="child_development">Child Development / Developmental Psychology</option>
              <option value="pediatrics">Pediatrics / Pediatric Medicine</option>
              <option value="clinical_psychology">Clinical Psychology / Neuropsychology</option>
              <option value="speech_language">Speech-Language Pathology</option>
              <option value="special_education">Special Education</option>
              <option value="occupational_therapy">Occupational Therapy</option>
              <option value="education">Education / Early Childhood Education</option>
              <option value="other">Other</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Years of Professional Experience <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="number" id="yearsExperience" min="0" max="60" placeholder="e.g., 15" required>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Arabic Language Proficiency <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <select id="language" required>
              <option value="">— Select —</option>
              <option value="native">Native Speaker</option>
              <option value="fluent">Fluent / Proficient</option>
              <option value="intermediate">Intermediate</option>
              <option value="basic">Basic</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-grid full">
          <div class="field">
            <label>Additional Background <span style="font-weight:400;color:#999">(optional)</span></label>
            <textarea id="additionalInfo" placeholder="Relevant certifications, subspecialties, or research experience"></textarea>
          </div>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ITEMS -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-header">Section 2 — Item Ratings (Quality and Clarity, 1–5)</div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="card-note">
        <strong>Quality:</strong> Does this item adequately measure its stated developmental domain?
        &nbsp;|&nbsp;
        <strong>Clarity:</strong> Is the item wording clear and comprehensible to Saudi Arabic-speaking parents?
        &nbsp;|&nbsp;
        Scale: 1 = Poor &nbsp; 2 = Below average &nbsp; 3 = Adequate &nbsp; 4 = Good &nbsp; 5 = Excellent
      </div>

      <div class="progress-wrap">
        <div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" id="progressFill" style="width:0%"></div></div>
        <div class="progress-text" id="progressText">0 of 0 items rated</div>
      </div>

      <div id="loadingMsg">
        <div class="spinner"></div>
        Loading items...
      </div>

      <div class="tbl-wrap" id="tableWrap" style="display:none">
        <table>
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th style="width:7%">Month</th>
              <th style="width:13%">Domain</th>
              <th style="width:5%">Code</th>
              <th style="width:24%">Arabic Item</th>
              <th style="width:23%">English Item</th>
              <th style="width:8%;text-align:center">Quality<br>(1–5)</th>
              <th style="width:8%;text-align:center">Clarity<br>(1–5)</th>
              <th style="width:12%">Comments</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody id="tbody"></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

      <div class="btn-row">
        <button class="btn btn-secondary" type="button" onclick="resetForm()">Clear All</button>
        <button class="btn btn-primary"   type="button" onclick="downloadCSV()">Download Ratings</button>
      </div>
      <p class="footnote">After downloading, please email the CSV file to the research team.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div><!-- /content -->

<script>
// ── CSV parser ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function splitLine(line) {
  const cols = []; let cur = '', inQ = false;
  for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i++) {
    if (line[i] === '"') { inQ = !inQ; }
    else if (line[i] === ',' && !inQ) { cols.push(cur); cur = ''; }
    else { cur += line[i]; }
  }
  cols.push(cur);
  return cols.map(c => c.replace(/^"|"$/g, '').trim());
}
function parseCSV(text) {
  const lines = text.trim().split(/\r?\n/);
  const headers = splitLine(lines[0]);
  return lines.slice(1).map(line => {
    const cols = splitLine(line);
    const obj = {};
    headers.forEach((h, i) => { obj[h] = cols[i] ?? ''; });
    return obj;
  });
}

// ── Domain badges ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const domClass = {
  'Communication':   'dom-Communication',
  'Gross motor':     'dom-Gross-motor',
  'Fine motor':      'dom-Fine-motor',
  'Problem-solving': 'dom-Problem-solving',
  'Personal-social': 'dom-Personal-social'
};

// ── Build table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let totalItems = 0;
function buildTable(items) {
  totalItems = items.length;
  const tbody = document.getElementById('tbody');
  const opts = '<option value="">—</option>' +
    [1,2,3,4,5].map(n => `<option value="${n}">${n}</option>`).join('');

  const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();
  items.forEach((row, i) => {
    const n   = i + 1;
    const dc  = domClass[row.domain] || '';
    const badge = dc
      ? `<span class="dom-badge ${dc}">${row.domain}</span>`
      : (row.domain || '');
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML =
      `<td style="font-size:.82em;white-space:nowrap">${row.quest_label || ''}</td>` +
      `<td>${badge}</td>` +
      `<td style="font-size:.82em"><code>${row.item_code || ''}</code></td>` +
      `<td dir="rtl" lang="ar" style="text-align:right">${row.item_text_ar || ''}</td>` +
      `<td>${row.item_text_en || ''}</td>` +
      `<td style="text-align:center">
        <select class="rating-sel" id="q_${n}"
          data-quest="${row.quest_label||''}" data-code="${row.item_code||''}"
          onchange="updateProgress()">
          ${opts}
        </select>
      </td>` +
      `<td style="text-align:center">
        <select class="rating-sel" id="c_${n}" onchange="updateProgress()">${opts}</select>
      </td>` +
      `<td><textarea class="comment-ta" id="t_${n}"></textarea></td>`;
    frag.appendChild(tr);
  });
  tbody.appendChild(frag);

  document.getElementById('loadingMsg').style.display  = 'none';
  document.getElementById('tableWrap').style.display   = 'block';
  updateProgress();
}

// ── Progress ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function updateProgress() {
  let rated = 0;
  for (let i = 1; i <= totalItems; i++) {
    const q = document.getElementById('q_' + i);
    const c = document.getElementById('c_' + i);
    if (q?.value && c?.value) rated++;
  }
  const pct = totalItems ? Math.round(rated / totalItems * 100) : 0;
  document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('progressText').textContent =
    `${rated} of ${totalItems} items rated (${pct}%)`;
}

// ── Load CSV ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
(async function () {
  const paths = ['data/item_quality_template.csv', 'item_quality_template.csv'];
  for (const p of paths) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(p);
      if (!res.ok) continue;
      const items = parseCSV(await res.text()).filter(r => r.item_code);
      if (items.length > 0) { buildTable(items); return; }
    } catch (_) { /* try next path */ }
  }
  document.getElementById('loadingMsg').innerHTML =
    '<p style="color:#c0392b;font-size:.9em">Items could not be loaded. ' +
    'Please open this page through a web server, not as a local file.</p>';
})();

// ── Validation ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
function validate() {
  const g = id => $(id).value.trim();
  if (!g('fullName'))        { showErr('Full Name is required.');                   return false; }
  if (!/\S+@\S+\.\S+/.test(g('email'))) { showErr('A valid Email is required.');  return false; }
  if (!g('expertise'))       { showErr('Field of Expertise is required.');          return false; }
  if (!g('yearsExperience')) { showErr('Years of Experience is required.');         return false; }
  if (!g('language'))        { showErr('Arabic Language Proficiency is required.'); return false; }
  return true;
}
function showErr(msg) {
  $('alertErr').textContent = msg; $('alertErr').style.display = 'block';
  $('alertOk').style.display = 'none';
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}
function showOk(msg) {
  $('alertOk').textContent = msg; $('alertOk').style.display = 'block';
  $('alertErr').style.display = 'none';
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

// ── Download ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const esc = v => {
  const s = String(v ?? '');
  return (s.includes(',') || s.includes('"') || s.includes('\n'))
    ? '"' + s.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"' : s;
};
function downloadCSV() {
  if (!validate()) return;
  const g = id => $(id).value.trim();
  const meta = [g('fullName'), g('email'), g('institution'),
                g('expertise'), g('yearsExperience'), g('language')];
  const rows = [['reviewer_name','reviewer_email','institution','expertise',
                 'years_experience','language','quest_label','item_code',
                 'quality','clarity','comments']];
  for (let i = 1; i <= totalItems; i++) {
    const q = $('q_' + i);
    rows.push([
      ...meta.map(esc),
      esc(q?.getAttribute('data-quest') || ''),
      esc(q?.getAttribute('data-code')  || ''),
      $('q_' + i)?.value || '',
      $('c_' + i)?.value || '',
      esc($('t_' + i)?.value || '')
    ]);
  }
  const blob = new Blob(['\uFEFF' + rows.map(r => r.join(',')).join('\n')],
                        { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
  const a = Object.assign(document.createElement('a'), {
    href: URL.createObjectURL(blob),
    download: 'asq3_review_' + g('fullName').replace(/\s+/g,'_') + '.csv'
  });
  document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a);
  showOk('Ratings downloaded successfully. Please email the CSV file to the research team. Thank you, ' + g('fullName') + '.');
}

// ── Reset ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function resetForm() {
  $('expertForm').reset();
  document.querySelectorAll('.rating-sel').forEach(el => el.value = '');
  document.querySelectorAll('.comment-ta').forEach(el => el.value  = '');
  $('alertErr').style.display = 'none';
  $('alertOk').style.display  = 'none';
  updateProgress();
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
```
